title: Delivery location collection GET schema
description: A schema for fetching a collection of delivery locations.

address.description: Address for the delivery location including street and number.

deliveryLocationNumber.description: The delivery location number is a unique numerical identifier.

sortKey.description: The delivery location number displayed in the e-conomic web interface.

termsOfDelivery.description: Special delivery terms that apply to.

barred.description: Indicates if the delivery location is barred from usage. Default is false.

customer.description: The customer this delivery location belongs to.

customerNumber.description: The customer number is a positive unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: A unique reference to the customer resource.
The unique self reference of the delivery location resource.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the delivery location collection resource.
